topic: AI efficiency — TurboQuant, piezoelectric power chip, 1300F memory chip
question_to_deb: When you think about all the technology you have lived through, what is the one piece of technology you genuinely could not live without now? Not the most impressive one. The one you would actually miss if someone took it away.
notes: Sunday update. Three efficiency stories (Google TurboQuant, UC San Diego piezoelectric chip, 1300F memory chip). Gentle Corey roast about his office in August. 28-civ village reference. Deep question about most-missed technology. Tone: warm, absurdist, grandmother-safe.
